text.title: ada-title-ii-compliance-2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ada-title-ii-compliance-2026 as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Deploying an accessibility overlay widget as the primary compliance strategy.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The DOJ has explicitly warned that overlays do not substitute for underlying code fixes. They remain legally exposed to Title II complaints. Fix the source, not the surface.

failure-mode.description: Overlay tools are recommended as the primary compliance strategy.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: DOJ has explicitly warned. Agent should refuse to recommend them as the primary fix.

failure-mode.description: LLM-generated audio descriptions often misread visuals (logos, charts).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require human QA on every minute of described content.

failure-mode.description: Auto-caption (Whisper, etc.) is ~92-96% accurate on clean audio.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: DOJ accuracy bar is "accurate, synchronized, complete" → human review mandatory before claiming compliance.

failure-mode.description: Agents mark a WCAG criterion "Supports" without evidence.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Train them to use "Not Tested" by default. Agents must NOT assert support without direct test evidence.

failure-mode.description: "Pass on automated scan" is equivalent to WCAG conformance.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Courts and DOJ require manual + AT testing. Automated scans detect only ~30% of real barriers.

failure-mode.description: Agent auto-publishes accessibility statements containing unverified claims.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always human sign-off. Don't assert "fully conformant" without evidence.

failure-mode.description: Accessibility statement review date becomes stale (>12 months old).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Watch for date traps: "last reviewed" must be ≤12 months on most state policies; agent should fail audit if stale.

failure-mode.description: Mobile apps tested only with web-based tools (axe, Lighthouse).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Mobile apps require platform-specific testing (XCUITest with Accessibility Inspector, Espresso AccessibilityChecks) — web-only agents will miss app barriers entirely.
